title: Restaurant Digital Ordering
background: A restaurant chain wants to improve digital ordering across mobile, web, and in-store kiosks.
candidate_prompt: How would you evaluate the situation and recommend what the organization should do next?
good_answer_includes: Clarifies business goals for the transformation
Identifies processes, systems, and data needing change
Considers adoption, governance, and change management
great_answer_includes: Avoids technology-first thinking without business value
Identifies capability gaps and operating model changes
Considers integration and data quality risks
interviewer_notes: A strong candidate should use a clear digital transformation structure, isolate the most important drivers, and connect the recommendation to business impact.
